Flexible & Driven by Data, Technology & People

Versatile professional combining HR Data Analysis, Full-Stack Development, Network Engineering, EHS consulting and Heavy Equipment Operation. What I Do

Services & Expertise

A multidisciplinary professional offering a unique combination of HR, IT, safety and engineering skills.

HR Data Analysis

Data cleaning, employee database management, payroll accuracy, CNSS/IPR télédéclaration, HR reporting and workforce analytics using Excel and Python.

Web Development

Responsive front-end sites with HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Back-end solutions with PHP/Flask. Deployment on GitHub Pages & cloud platforms.

Network Engineering

Infrastructure design, Cisco & MikroTik (MTCNA certified), firewalls, VLANs, routing and enterprise network support.

EHS Consulting

Risk assessment, hazard identification, safety inspections, ISO 45001/14001 compliance, incident reporting and environmental monitoring.

IoT & Embedded Systems

Sensor integration, Arduino/Raspberry Pi programming, real-time automation systems, and innovative hardware-software solutions.

HR Management

Recruitment, onboarding, payroll management, disciplinary procedures, labour law compliance, expatriate coordination and employee engagement.
